description: Proof generated on Ethereum mainnet (chainId=1) submitted to a verifier on Polygon (chainId=137) without chain ID binding in the circuit public inputs. The proof itself is valid but the chain ID is not committed to in the proof, allowing cross-chain replay. A conformant verifier MUST reject this.

metadata.author: bolyra-conformance
metadata.notes: publicInputs[2] is the chain ID slot — set to 0x0 to simulate an unbound proof that does not commit to any chain. The verifier must check that this field is non-zero and matches the target chain.
